```json
{
  "resourceType" : "QuestionnaireResponse",
  "id" : "QR-PostOP-Fall1",
  "questionnaire" : "https://www.senologie.org/fhir/Questionnaire/senologie-postop",
  "status" : "completed",
  "subject" : {
    "reference" : "Patient/Fall1-Patient-Erika-Neumann"
  },
  "authored" : "2025-02-05",
  "item" : [{
    "linkId" : "operation",
    "item" : [{
      "linkId" : "op-kategorie",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueCoding" : {
          "system" : "http://snomed.info/sct",
          "code" : "392022002",
          "display" : "Excision of mass"
        }
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "op-seite",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueCoding" : {
          "system" : "http://snomed.info/sct",
          "code" : "80248007",
          "display" : "Left breast structure"
        }
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "op-datum",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueDate" : "2025-02-05"
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "op-code-text",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "BET links, Sentinel-LK-Biopsie"
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "op-intention",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueCoding" : {
          "system" : "https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/ext/modul-onko/CodeSystem/mii-cs-onko-intention",
          "code" : "K",
          "display" : "kurativ"
        }
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "op-outcome",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "R0-Resektion, Sentinel negativ (0/2)"
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "followup-drainage",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "Redon-Drainage 10 Ch"
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "followup-verband",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "Kompressionsverband"
      }]
    }]
  }]
}
```
